mundo.titulo: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
mundo.resumen: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

mundo.titulo: Hot weather to intensify in UK over bank holiday weekend
mundo.resumen: Amber heat health alerts are in place for the Midlands, eastern and south-east England.

mundo.titulo: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
mundo.resumen: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

mundo.titulo: Ebola experts and survivor from outbreak a decade ago warn lessons must be learnt
mundo.resumen: Those caught up in West Africa's Ebola outbreak a decade ago on how best to tackle the current epidemic.

mundo.titulo: UK officials suggested single market for goods with Europe
mundo.resumen: Industry figures briefed on the move said the idea has not been taken forward at this point, after EU scepticism.

mundo.titulo: 'Suddenly I could see myself': Why breast reductions are more popular now
mundo.resumen: For the first time, more people in the UK are choosing reduction procedures than enlargements.

negocios.titulo: Stop blaming young people for being unemployed, says Amazon's UK boss
negocios.resumen: John Boumphrey says the education system "isn't necessarily producing young people who are ready for work".

negocios.titulo: Bank boss sorry after describing workers as 'lower value human capital'
negocios.resumen: The Standard Chartered boss said he values all colleagues and is committed to helping them cope with change.

negocios.titulo: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
negocios.resumen: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

negocios.titulo: Trump wants new Fed chair to be 'totally independent'
negocios.resumen: The US president piled major pressure on Kevin Warsh's predecessor to cut interest rates.

negocios.titulo: Morrisons planning to close 100 stores in next few months
negocios.resumen: It said difficulties had been exacerbated by "significant cost increases resulting from government policy choices".

negocios.titulo: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
negocios.resumen: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.

tecnologia.titulo: Peec, one of Berlin’s rising startups, more than doubled annualized revenue in months to $10M, sources say
tecnologia.resumen: Peec, which helps brands track their presence in AI searches, offers proof of a key trend among European startups.

tecnologia.titulo: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
tecnologia.resumen: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.

tecnologia.titulo: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
tecnologia.resumen: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.

tecnologia.titulo: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
tecnologia.resumen: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.

tecnologia.titulo: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
tecnologia.resumen: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.

tecnologia.titulo: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
tecnologia.resumen: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.

tecnologia.titulo: Google’s new anything-to-anything AI model is wild
tecnologia.resumen: Last year I deepfaked my kid's stuffed animal to make it look like his plush deer was on vacation. It was an experiment to see if I could re-create the events depicted in a Gemini ad Google was running, and I never showed the videos of Buddy the deer on his adventures to my four-year-old. […]

tecnologia.titulo: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for
tecnologia.resumen: Google's AI Overviews are running into an interesting problem right now. Earlier on Friday, if you searched for the term "disregard," the AI Overview section would include a response like what you'd see from a more traditional AI chatbot instead of the typical AI summary, as spotted on X. As you can see in the […]

tecnologia.titulo: Twelve South’s AirFly Pro 2 has hit one of its best prices ahead of summer travel
tecnologia.resumen: With Memorial day weekend kicking off the travel season, we’re seeing a lot of deals pop up on travel gadgets, from portable power banks to noise-canceling headphones. tecnologia.titulo: Meta’s Forum is part Reddit, part Facebook, and part Google AI Overview
tecnologia.resumen: Meta's new Forum app for iPhones takes Facebook Groups and moves them to a dedicated app with a dedicated AI chatbot to go with it, like an AI revamp of the ill-fated Groups app Facebook shut down in 2017. tecnologia.titulo: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
tecnologia.resumen: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok barely appears in federal records of how the US government used AI last year. It's not the only sign xAI's […]
